headline: Enforcing Principle-Based Coding Patterns in Claude
lede: Stop the hallucinations and the unnecessary bloat by imposing a strict set of architectural guardrails. This project maps out a clear path for your AI assistant to prioritize goal-driven execution over redundant refactoring.

headline: Deploying Persistent Agents That Evolve With Experience
lede: The Hermes Agent framework moves beyond simple chat, establishing a long-term memory loop that adapts to your unique workflow. It functions as a modular control layer for orchestrating tasks across your entire digital environment.

headline: Forecasting Market Candlesticks With Foundation Models
lede: Kronos provides a dedicated architecture for quantizing and predicting complex financial time-series data. By transforming raw market signals into hierarchical discrete tokens, it offers a rigorous baseline for algorithmic performance analysis.

headline: Securing Long-Term Memory for AI Development Sessions
lede: Claude-Mem solves the issue of context loss by anchoring your AI's history in a hybrid relational and vector database. It keeps your architectural decisions encrypted, persistent, and accessible across disjointed coding iterations.

headline: Standardizing Unstructured Documents Into LLM-Ready Markdown
lede: MarkItDown simplifies the messy reality of PDF and office documentation by converting heterogeneous files into clean, token-efficient streams. It is the essential infrastructure component for building robust and reliable retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

headline: Scaling Autonomous Agents as Integrated Development Teammates
lede: Multica moves beyond experimental chat interfaces to provide a stable, production-ready control plane for multi-agent workflows. It allows engineering teams to manage task lifecycles and skill compounding within a unified, reliable dashboard.

headline: Imposing Deterministic Scaffolding on Stochastic Coding Assistants
lede: Archon forces unpredictable AI agents into a rigid, repeatable structure modeled after established software deployment pipelines. It provides the necessary observability to ensure that autonomous code generation remains strictly controlled.

headline: Translating Requirements Into Code Through Incremental Cycles
lede: Ralph turns the development process into a continuous loop of requirement parsing and iterative feature implementation. It is a raw, pragmatic look at how to build software by treating LLM-generated code as a mutable, evolving draft.

headline: Simulating Agentic Hedge Funds With Multi-Perspective Analysis
lede: This proof-of-concept project aggregates disparate market sentiments into a cohesive, automated portfolio strategy. It provides a unique window into how autonomous agents navigate the complexities of global trading environments through the dark hours.

headline: Curating Advanced Implementation Recipes for Claude Integrations
lede: These canonical examples offer a scholarly approach to mastering RAG, tool-use, and multi-agent orchestration. It is an essential collection for developers who require verified, documentable patterns for complex LLM deployment.
